prediction.reasoning: Predicting stock prices is inherently complex and subject to many unpredictable factors, including market sentiment, news events, economic data, and company-specific announcements. As an AI, I do not have access to real-time market data beyond my last training update nor the ability to perform live financial analysis. The point estimate is a slight adjustment from the current price, acknowledging minor daily fluctuations. The confidence intervals are estimated based on a general understanding of typical daily stock volatility (approximated here as a daily standard deviation of around 2.5% of the current price) and assume a normal distribution of price movements. These are theoretical estimations and actual future prices could fall outside these ranges.
